title: Career Opportunity Teacher at CL Educate

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at CL Educate
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
